ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "component_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the course component */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or topic of the course */,
  "hpw" REAL /* Hours per week allocated for the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., individual instruction) */,
  "cp_per_semester" REAL /* Credit points awarded per semester for completing the course */,
  "equivalent_module" TEXT /* Module to which this course is equivalent */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current status of enrollment for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module content */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the module */,
  "is_core_module" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the module is a core requirement */,
  "credit_hours" REAL /* Total credit hours for the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam */,
  "is_dropped" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student dropped the course */,
  "drop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping the course */,
  "is_enrolled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is currently enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is an international student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the instructor is affiliated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the instructor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date of hire of the instructor */,
  "tenure_status" TEXT /* Tenure status of the instructor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the instructor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the instructor is assigned */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
